## Very disappointing experience with…
Very disappointing experience with Bolna. Been trying to reach them for months regarding a refund, but there has been absolutely no response. There is no visible customer support channel, no working contact number, and emails go unanswered. It feels like once they have your payment, communication completely stops. If you’re considering using their services, be aware that getting support or resolving billing issues may be impossible. Very frustrating experience overall.

results.title: Bolna: Build Your Perfect Voice AI Agent
results.content:
1. Fills in the blanks using thousands of patterns proven across sectors
2. Structures the agent into Identity, Conversation and Closing blocks
3. Auto-picks the best combination of models for your use case
4. Handles edge cases, warm endings and fallbacks, not just linear scripts
5. Reviews itself against quality benchmarks and fills whatever's missing before shipping

Sign up in the morning, have a production-grade agent taking real calls by evening. No more prompting frustratiosn.

The part I keep coming back to - the hardest thing about Bolna's first two years was the manual work. Agent Studio is us handing that exact superpower to anyone who signs up.

The barrier to building with Voice has dropped to almost nothing. [...] Report

## More Relevant Posts

View organization page for Exato.ai

6,624 followers [...] Calling customer care three times because their balance vanished and nobody can explain why.
Switching SIM cards because the network just stops working in half their house.
None of them ever said "I wish this app was smarter."
What they would actually pay for is boring reliability. A network that works when they need it. Transparent billing that does not trick them into subscriptions they never wanted. Customer service that picks up the phone and solves the problem in one call.
LLMs are incredible tools when applied to real friction. But telecom companies keep adding features users do not want instead of fixing the basics that make people switch providers.

Review Bolna?

Reviews

Most Informative

Bolna

Bolna

•1 review

Bolna's recruitment platform is a game changer! Six months ago, hiring a backend developer took us an entire month. Last month, we needed a frontend developer, and the process was wrapped up in just three days. The difference? Bolna's AI-driven pre-screening made it super efficient. It evaluated candidates on multiple parameters, including the relevance of their skills to the job, the accuracy of the skills listed on their resumes, and their communication abilities. The platform provided detailed ratings and insights, helping us quickly shortlist 2 to 3 candidates from over 100 applicants. Would 10/10 recommend anyone to include Bolna in their hiring process.

Report [...] Report

 17 views

Bolna

Bolna

•1 review

Bolna's voice AI literally called me and ran a full phone interview. I wasn’t sure what to expect, but the experience was super smooth. It asked thoughtful questions, handled pauses like a real person, and the tone didn’t feel robotic at all. It actually felt like I was talking to a recruiter. What I loved most? No long wait times. I got feedback and next steps right after the call. So efficient. Shoutout to the team behind Bolna — this tech is going to change the game for hiring
